edges.note: Email-specific GIF first-frame obligation refines the general motion constraints.
Audience language rules and the master brochure both govern messaging/tone consistency.
The declared background color in metadata enables the assembler to enforce dark-section non-adjacency.
Declared consumed footnote symbols enable assembly-time ordered assignment.
Both enforce section self-containment for clean stacking with locked components.
Coral's restriction is a specific case of the tertiary-as-accent hierarchy rule.
Chart emphasis reservation reflects the primary/secondary/tertiary usage discipline.
The ad-hoc prohibition permits exactly the callout/wave tints defined here.
The ad-hoc prohibition permits the campaign headline letter tint as one of the allowed exceptions.
Usage-context guidance operates within the approved-only exclusivity constraint.
Both govern the masthead gradient application together with direction.
The safe/avoided pair list operationalizes the WCAG AA contrast minimums.
Governs the background asset usage and skip exception within the callout layout.
Locks the mandatory button radius that persists even under the background-skip exception.
Geometry section pins the exact bisector/inset math for the box structure.
Mandatory radius spec constrains the box/badge shapes.
Required shadow is part of the badge treatment.
Fallback addresses clients that ignore the absolute-positioned bisector geometry.
Both govern CTA sections: styling of the button and its per-section cardinality.
24px insets and zero-gap stacking presuppose the fixed 600px edge-to-edge canvas.
Usage guidance for the wave device whose construction/colorways are locked.
Lifestyle photos are cropped into the accent shape.
Alt text obligation applies to all imagery including lifestyle photography.
Charts and tables override the asymmetric accent-shape radius with a uniform 12px radius.
Adds per-email orientation consistency to the accent shape container spec.
Container fill/header colors work with the series color logic.
Header bar styling sits on the container header bar.
Stat hero and subordinate footnote establish the chart's data hierarchy.
Palette constraint applies alongside the minimal line style.
Accessibility sizing applies to the same line-style icons.
Canonical block pattern operates within the single-focal-point layout discipline.
The ® symbol is only applied when the generic name is included, which uses the mandated parenthetical lowercase format.
The trademarked first-mention form still renders LISRAYA in all caps.
Body/footnote sizes in the scale must respect the 16px body minimum and 12px running-text floor.
The scale exists to support the distinct-hierarchy requirement.
Email stack operationalizes the Nunito Sans digital requirement with fallbacks.
Campaign headline is a sanctioned exception to the no-ALL-CAPS baseline.
Chart headlines are a sanctioned exception to the no-ALL-CAPS baseline.
Required-bold targets are the specific always-bold cases within the overall bold budget.
Stacking limit governs how bold combines with other emphasis devices.
Headings exception restricts where DM abbreviation may appear.
Tinted-letter treatment refines the base campaign headline typography.
Verbatim lockup copy accompanies the styled headline in hero placements.
